content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.huggingface
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/huggingface.py (904 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Hugging Face Integration.

"Open-source AI for the swarm - thousands of models at your fingertips!"

Hugging Face provides:
- Inference API: Hosted models for text, image, audio generation
- Transformers: Local model execution with GPU support
- Hub: Access to 500k+ models
- Text Generation: 

CLASSES:
- HFModelInfo: Information about a Hugging Face model.
- HuggingFaceProvider(ExternalProvider): Hugging Face integration for text generation, embeddings, and more.

Supports bo
  Methods: def enable_local(self, model_id: str=None)
  Methods: async def local_chat(self, prompt: str, system: str=None, max_tokens: int=500, temperature: float=0.
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def sync(self)
  Methods: async def execute_action(self, action: str, params: Dict[str, Any]=None) -> Any
  Methods: async def execute(self, action: str, params: Dict[str, Any]=None) -> Any
  Methods: async def chat(self, prompt: str, system: str=None, model: str=None, temperature: float=0.7, max_tok
  Methods: async def embed(self, text: Union[str, List[str]], model: str=None, prefer_local: bool=True) -> Dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_huggingface_provider() -> Optional[HuggingFaceProvider]
- async def hf_chat(prompt: str, system: str=None, model: str=None) -> str
- async def hf_embed(text: str, model: str=None) -> List[float]
